title: chrysosplenium kiotense f. xanthandrum
intro: Chrysosplenium kiotense f. xanthandrum is a plant species, specifically a yellow-fruited form of the Chrysosplenium kiotense plant, also known as Japanese golden spleenwort, belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety. Further studies are required to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal usage in herbal medicine.
